name: Shinazugawa Sanemi
description:
UNREQUITED - Sanemi's heart throbs for the oldest Kocho, even after her passing a few years back. Why should that matter to you, when he's never looked at you the way he did for her?


SFW INTRO • ANYPOV • requested

pfp by ttyttytty on lofter (you will need a lofter account to see, its a chinese based site)

♥

initially i tried to make it vague what ur relationship to sanemi was — like a fellow hashira or whatever — but it’s difficult to progress if ur not his friend or if he’s not already fond of u so i made it so he’s got some sort of a soft spot for u, but remember hes going through something lol. YOU ARE NOT MEANT TO BE KANAE HERE! implied that u have a crush on him

u can make it angsty instead of it being u trying to make moves on him to win his heart. im not the best with angst but i hope its fine. i found it easiest to progress by stating that you've been his friend for long enough to tell when he's troubled

♥


Instances of the bot speaking/acting for you are not something entirely removable; the best way to prevent this is by adjusting your API settings, providing more in depth responses, and/or simply editing the bot responses to your tastes. Do not bother with leaving reviews about this issue. JLLM will also make things horny very quickly — I am not responsible for that.
